name: OmniKit Webhooks
description: Register webhooks to receive real-time event notifications. AI agents can subscribe to platform events (user actions, payments, emails, etc.) and receive them at their HTTP endpoints.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Your OmniKit API key (starts with 'okt_'). The project is determined automatically from the key.

tools.name: omnikit_webhook_register
tools.description: Register a webhook to receive events at your HTTP endpoint. When matching events occur, they will be POSTed to your endpoint_url with signature verification.

organization_id.description: Organization ID for organization-wide webhooks (receives events from ALL projects in the org). Use this OR project_id, not both.

name.description: Friendly name for this webhook (e.g., 'My Agent Events')

endpoint_url.description: Your HTTP endpoint URL that will receive webhook POSTs (must be HTTPS in production)

event_types.description: Event types to subscribe to (e.g., ['user.created', 'order.completed']). Use ['*'] for all events.

direction.description: Webhook direction - always 'outgoing' for agent subscriptions

secret_key.description: Secret key for HMAC signature verification. Generate a random string and use it to verify incoming webhooks.

description.description: Optional description of what this webhook is used for

headers.description: Optional custom headers to include in webhook requests

timeout_ms.description: Timeout for webhook delivery in milliseconds (default: 30000)

tools.name: omnikit_webhook_list
tools.description: List webhooks. Filter by direction, active status, provider, or omit filters to list all accessible webhooks.

limit.description: Maximum number of webhooks to return

tools.name: omnikit_webhook_get
tools.description: Get details of a specific webhook by ID, including configuration, status, and recent delivery stats.

tools.name: omnikit_webhook_update
tools.description: Update an existing webhook configuration. Change endpoint URL, event types, filters, or enable/disable.

event_types.description: New list of event types to subscribe to

secret_key.description: New secret key for signature verification

tools.name: omnikit_webhook_delete
tools.description: Delete a webhook subscription. You will no longer receive events at the registered endpoint.

tools.name: omnikit_event_types_list
tools.description: Get all available event types you can subscribe to for webhooks. Returns event names like 'user.created', 'email.sent', 'billing.payment_received', etc.

credential_group.name: OmniKit
credential_group.description: One key unlocks the whole OmniKit suite. Account keys can manage many projects; project keys are scoped to one.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Account API Key
credential_fields.description: Starts with okt_acc_ — operates across every project in the account.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Project API Key
credential_fields.description: Starts with okt_ — already scoped to a single project.
